about.disclaimer: This application is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Hugging Face, Inc. "Hugging Face" is a trademark of Hugging Face, Inc., used here only to refer to the service this application connects to.
about.privacy: Privacy: everything stays on your machine. No telemetry, no analytics. Your token is encrypted with your OS keychain and stored locally.
about.title: About

updates.available: Version {{version}} is available from GitHub Releases.
updates.description: Updates are checked against the latest published GitHub Release.

errors.configuration: The GitHub Release update metadata is unavailable.
errors.network: Couldn't reach GitHub Releases. Check your connection and try again.
errors.permission: The updater doesn't have permission to install this update.
errors.unknown: The update couldn't be completed. Try again or install it from GitHub Releases.
errors.verification: The update couldn't be verified, so it wasn't installed.

updates.manual: Version {{version}} is available. This unsigned build must be updated manually.
updates.ready: Version {{version}} is ready. Restart the app to install it.
updates.title: App updates
updates.unsupported: In-app updates are available only in installed builds.

billing.empty: No usage recorded for the current period.
billing.gated: Billing usage requires the read-billing permission. Re-authorize to grant it.
billing.title: Billing usage
billing.unauthorized: The Hub did not authorize this token to read billing usage.

hub.missingScopes: Missing permissions: {{scopes}}. Re-authorize to grant them.
hub.scopesUnknown: The permissions granted to this session are unknown. Re-authorize to refresh them.
hub.title: Hub account
